headlines.title: No pressure, SpaceX, but your blockbuster IPO could reshape the market as we know it
headlines.description: A re-rating of space stocks has already started occurring across multiple subsectors. Rocket Lab, the purest comp for SpaceX, is up 7% since reports of the IPO filing.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO Boosts Tiny Space ETF With Record Surge in Inflows - Bloomberg
headlines.description: The looming market debut of Elon Musk’s rocket company SpaceX has sparked a rush of capital into smaller space ventures with investors eager to find a way to hitch a ride onto what could be the biggest listing ever.
